titleStmt.title: SII 19.234: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 234. (A.R. No. 368 of 1921.) TIRUVADI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE ARDHA-MAṆḌAPA, TIRUVIRAṬṬĀNĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is damaged in the middle portion. It seems to record some endowment (in money) by one Pāṇḍippēraiyaṉ for the supply of ghee to the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānam at Ādhirājamaṅgalyapuram, and with it also to six other sacred shrines viz. Tiruvāraṇavāśi, Tīrunāgīśvaram, Tiruvagattīśvaram, Tiruvagnīśvaram Tiruviḍaiñāḻal and Tiruppaḻañam, for the performance of pañchagavya ceremony and for offerings to the deities on the first day of every month, and (also) for special śrībali offerings on the days of the Tiruvādirai asterism. The gift was left in charge of the Nagarattār who held themselves responsible for conducting the worship.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecariva
rmarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu Ā
dhirājamaṅgalyapūrattu devā
krati tiruviraṭṭāṉamun ti
ruvāraṇavāciyun tirunā
kiśvaramun tiruvakatti
śvaramun tiruvagniśvaramu
n tiruviṭaiñāḻalun
tiruppaḻaññamum Āṉa Eḻu
kṣetrattiṟkum pāṇṭi
pporai tanā
kaḷ
ku ppoṉ
ṉūṟṟaiñcu Innūṟṟaiñcā
lum Āṇṭuvaraiy Irājake
cariyā laṭṭakkaṭava ney ṉūṟ
ṟumuppattoru nāḻi Uḻakku In
neyuḷ paṉṉiru nāḻi neyyāka
pāl Iruṉūṟṟu nāṟpati nāḻiyum
patiṉāṉāḻi Uḻakku neyyāl
tayir Irunūṟṟu nāṟpati nāḻiyum
tiṅkaḷopāti piṟan=ta nāḷ pañuka
vyam(ā)ṭṭuvatākavum Innāḷeḻu
kṣetrattiṟkum Appotu
tiruvamutu kāṭṭuvatākavum peru
ntiruppali potakaṭava
tākavum Eḻukkumāka vaitta
poṉ patiṉkaḻantu Ippoṉ
pottarap patiṉoṉṟā
Ivvūr nakarattār
kuṭutta poṉ pattumā
pattāl vanta
neyyu Ippalicaiyālu
[n tri] kālamum celuttuvo
māṉo(m*) nakaratto mippe
run tiruppali tiṅkaṭoṟu
n tiruvātiraināḷā lippali
pottaruvomāṉom na
karattom ..
Eḻu kṣe
trattukkumāka
kṣetrattāl
Aivvanta
Iṭṭa ceppu
kalacam mup
pattaiñcu
Ippaṭi ko
ṇṭu celuttu
vomāṉom
nakarattom .
Digital edition of SII 19.234 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
